approve-estimations-desc: All users in this group and the contact's agent and/or client will be notified when a quote is approved
approve-notify-estimations-desc: All users in this group and the contact's agent and/or client will be notified when a quote is approved
approve-status-estimations-desc: Use this status for the budget when it is approved. Leaving it empty means not showing the approval button
cancel-estimations-desc: All users in this group and the contact's agent and/or client will be notified when a quote is canceled
cancel-notify-estimations-desc: All users in this group and the contact's agent and/or client will be notified when a quote is canceled
cancel-notify-orders-desc: All users of this group and the contact and/or customer's agent will be notified when an order is canceled.
cancel-orders-desc: All users in this group and the contact agent and/or customer will be notified when an order is canceled
cancel-status-estimations-desc: Use this status for the quote when cancelled. Leaving it empty means not showing the cancel button
cancel-status-orders-desc: Use this status for the order when it is cancelled. Leaving it empty means not showing the cancel button
catalogue-company-desc: Use this company for product catalogue and online store
catalogue-warehouse-desc: Select a warehouse or leave it empty to use all warehouses of the selected company
client-portal-access: These are your access data to the client portal.
client-portal-link-body: Click on the following link to access the client portal.
client-portal-link-not-sent: The email with the client portal link could not be sent
client-portal-link-sent: A new password was created and an email with the client portal link was sent
contact-is-not-a-customer: The contact is not a customer
contact-not-active-portal: Contact %nick% is not active in the client portal
contact-without-email-portal: Contact %nick% does not have an email
delivery-note-payment-made-success: Payment for delivery note %code% was successful.
document-paid-but-could-not-mark-as-paid: Document paid but could not be marked as paid
document-paid-but-invoices-empty: Document paid but there are no invoices
document-paid-but-new-status-not-found: Document paid but new status not found
document-paid-but-status-could-not-be-up: Document paid but status could not be updated
email-attachment-invoice: Attached to this email you will find the invoice %code% with a total amount of %total%. You can view it by clicking on the button below.
email-invoice-text-portal-cliente: We attach the invoice %code% with an amount of %total%. You can view it by clicking on the button below.
email-payment-made-correctly: Payment made correctly for the document %code% with a total amount of %total%. You can view it by clicking on the button below.
error-sending-invoice-email: Error sending the email with the invoice
file-not-moved: The file could not be moved: %file%
folder-not-created: The folder could not be created: %folder%
modal-bank-transfer-desc: Once payment is made and verified in our bank account, we will proceed with the service execution. You can send a copy of the receipt to %email%.
modal-bank-transfer-info: To make the payment, transfer the total amount to one of the following accounts.
new-note-body: A new note has been added to your client area, you can view it by clicking the link below.
new-support-ticket-body: Contact %nick% has created a new support ticket #%code%.
not-have-access-to-this-page: You do not have access to this page.
note-body-is-required: The body of the note is a required field
note-customer-or-contact-is-required: The memo must have a customer or an associated contact
notify-tickets-desc: All users of this group will be notified when a new ticket is created or replied to
order-paid-but-invoice-could-not-be-crea: Order paid but invoice could not be created
order-paid-but-status-could-not-be-updat: Order paid but status could not be updated
pay-with-paypal-desc: Use your PayPal account or credit card...
pay-with-redsys-desc: Pay by credit or debit card
payment-notify-delivery-notes-desc: All users in this group and the contact/agent will be notified when a delivery note is paid
payment-notify-estimations-desc: All users in this group and the contact/agent will be notified when an estimate is paid
payment-notify-invoices-desc: All users in this group and the contact/agent will be notified when an invoice is paid
payment-notify-orders-desc: All users in this group and the contact/agent will be notified when an order is paid
payment-status-delivery-notes-desc: Use this status for the delivery note when paid. Leaving it blank will not show the payment button
payment-status-estimations-desc: Use this status for the estimate when paid. Leaving it blank will not show the payment button
payment-status-invoices-desc: Use this status for the invoice when paid. Leaving it blank will not show the payment button
payment-status-orders-desc: Use this status for the order when paid. Leaving it blank will not show the payment button
paypal-api-auth-error: Authentication error with the PayPal API
paypal-payment-not-supported: PayPal does not support payment for the model %model%
redsys-payment-not-supported: Redsys does not support payment for model %model%.
remember-cart-body: You haven't visited our online store for a while and your shopping cart is still waiting for you. You can view it by clicking on the following link.
remember-cart-not-sent: Could not send the reminder email with the link to your cart
remember-cart-sent: A reminder email has been sent with the link to your cart.
remember-cart-subject: Your cart is waiting for you
shop_serie: Select the series to be used when making a purchase in the store
shop-document-desc: Select the type of document to be used when making a purchase in the store
shop-warehouse-desc: Select the warehouse to use when creating the order
show-on-client-portal-when-paying: Show on client portal when paying
status-approve-estimations-not-configure: Approval status of estimates not configured
status-cancel-estimations-not-configured: Cancellation status of estimates not configured
status-cancel-orders-not-configured: Cancellation status of orders not configured
stripe-payment-not-supported: Stripe does not support payment for the model %model%
there-are-new-comments-while-you-were-wr: There are new comments while you were writing
update-note-body: A note has been updated in your client area, you can view it by clicking the link below.
use-this-address-as-billing-address: Use this address as billing address
you-need-an-email-to-pay-online: You need an email to pay online
your-browser-does-not-support-video: Your browser does not support video
